name: rm_nonspeech
description: Remove all non-speech regions using whisper word-level timestamps

input.description: Source video file or trim spec JSON from a prior step

output.description: Trim spec JSON containing only speech regions

params.name: model
params.description: Whisper model for speech detection. Larger = slower + more accurate.

params.name: max-word-gap
params.description: Maximum gap between words to bridge in seconds. Larger = fewer cuts.

params.name: sentence-edge
params.description: Padding to keep before and after each speech region in seconds
